summary: Verified two UI improvements in Job modal: 1) Certificate view icons (FileText) now appear in stones table Certificate column for stones with certificate_scan_url - clicking opens the certificate scan viewer dialog. 2) Print layout uses a single table with grouped stones separated by header rows (no repeated column headers).
passed_tests: TEST 1: Certificate view icons (FileText) visible in Certificate column for stones with certificate_scan_url
TEST 1.1: 5 certificate icons found for Job #3 (all 5 stones have scans)
TEST 1.2: Clicking certificate icon opens Certificate Scan viewer dialog
TEST 1.3: Certificate Scan dialog shows stone SKU in title (e.g., 'Certificate Scan - DI075J303')
TEST 2: Certificate column header present in stones table
TEST 3: Grouped stones have visual separator row (navy header) with certificate label
TEST 4: Ungrouped stones display first, then grouped stones below separator
TEST 5: Print layout verified in code - single table with one thead, group separators as tr rows
TEST 5.1: Print layout does NOT repeat table headers for each group - verified in handlePrintJob function
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Job #3 with 5 stones (3 ungrouped, 2 in Certificate 1 group)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Job modal stones table now includes Certificate column with view icons. handlePrintJob function generates single-table layout with group separator rows. Both features verified working correctly.
